dataset: Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b pre-populated Derby database

pi_items.source: Compared against Floreant POS pre-populated database (USERS table); 'Maria' does not appear in original database sample data (Admin System, Lisa Carol, Janet Ann, John Doe, Poll Brien found)
Compared against Floreant POS pre-populated database (USERS table); 'Santos' does not appear in original database sample data
Not found in original database sample data (PINs in sample: 1111, 2222, 3333, 7777, 8888); appears to be synthetic test data
USER_TYPE lookup table verification: N_USER_TYPE=3 maps to 'CASHIER' in Floreant POS database (verified via direct Derby database query of /database/derby-single/posdb)
Original database sample data from Floreant POS pre-populated Derby database: Admin System user has USER_PASS=1111 (verified via direct Derby database query)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic employee data (Maria Santos with PIN 2345) that does not exist in the original Floreant POS database. The CASHIER user type is a verified valid role in the Floreant POS system (maps to N_USER_TYPE=3). The manager PIN 1111 is verified as the correct default manager/admin PIN in the Floreant POS pre-populated database. The database schema uses columns USER_PASS (not PASSWORD) and N_USER_TYPE (not USER_TYPE), which creates compatibility issues with the verification scripts.
